content: TASK-029 interrupt done: collapsed zone representatives now retain the original zone palette on the representative node and outgoing edges while the closed zone box stays hidden. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work unless the human chooses to extend the same visible click surface to an explicit subgraph display mode or polish collapse summaries. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
